## Checklist

- [ ] The change is problem-first, not pattern-first.
- [ ] The explanation includes practical usage.
- [ ] The explanation includes misuse risks.
- [ ] The content follows the correct template.
- [ ] The examples are realistic.
- [ ] No empty placeholder sections were added.
